prompt: A hyper-realistic top-down photograph of a young male model with a clean skin fade and short curly textured hair, standing in a confident, relaxed pose directly on the glowing screen of a giant iPhone 16. The phone screen is active, displaying a dark-themed Spotify playlist with the song title "Sajanka - Sun is Coming" clearly visible beneath him. He wears 2025 AirPods Max in a neutral metallic finish, an oversized white hoodie-style shirt with subtle drape, black athletic shorts, and crisp white Air Jordan sneakers. The top-down high angle flattens the scene and emphasizes the surreal scale—the model’s feet rest on digital buttons and album art. Lighting is soft, minimal, and diffused, with a cool neutrality that makes the white clothing and bright screen pop without harsh shadows. Colors are constrained: brilliant white, deep black, titanium grey, and a small vivid accent from the Spotify album cover. Textures contrast smoothly: matte cotton fabric, glossy headphone surfaces, and the glass screen's slight reflectivity. Style is sleek, minimal, fashion-forward, and futuristic, blending tech advertising aesthetics with editorial portraiture. The mood is confident, fresh, and effortlessly cool.
